Back to website Python lab Docs index

Macaulay2.Py

Clean code reading view for studying, copying, and comparing your own implementation.

emergency-path/.venv/Lib/site-packages/pygments/lexers/macaulay2.py

Runs the exact Python code shown below. Output is saved in this browser.


    

    
    
    

      
"""
    pygments.lexers.macaulay2
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

    Lexer for Macaulay2.

    :copyright: Copyright 2006-present by the Pygments team, see AUTHORS.
    :license: BSD, see LICENSE for details.
"""

from pygments.lexer import RegexLexer, words
from pygments.token import Comment, Keyword, Name, String, Text

__all__ = ['Macaulay2Lexer']

# Auto-generated for Macaulay2-1.25.11. Do not modify this file manually.

M2KEYWORDS = (
    "SPACE",
    "TEST",
    "and",
    "break",
    "breakpoint",

M2CONSTANTS = (
    "A1BrouwerDegrees",
    "AbstractSimplicialComplexes",
    "AbstractToricVarieties",
    "Acknowledgement",
    "AdditionalPaths",

    "VNumber",
    "WebApp",
    "Weights",
    "WeilDivisors",
    "WeylAlgebra",
    "WeylAlgebras",
    "WeylGroups",
    "WhitneyStratifications",
    "Wrap",
    "XML",
    "yonedaSheafExtension"
    )

class Macaulay2Lexer(RegexLexer):
    """Lexer for Macaulay2, a software system for research in algebraic geometry."""

    name = 'Macaulay2'
    url = 'https://macaulay2.com/'
    aliases = ['macaulay2']
    filenames = ['*.m2']
    version_added = '2.12'

    tokens = {
        'root': [
            (r'--.*$', Comment.Single),
            (r'-\*', Comment.Multiline, 'block comment'),
            (r'"', String, 'quote string'),
            (r'///', String, 'slash string'),
            (words(M2KEYWORDS, prefix=r'\b', suffix=r'\b'), Keyword),
            (words(M2DATATYPES, prefix=r'\b', suffix=r'\b'), Name.Builtin),
            (words(M2FUNCTIONS, prefix=r'\b', suffix=r'\b'), Name.Function),
            (words(M2CONSTANTS, prefix=r'\b', suffix=r'\b'), Name.Constant),
            (r'\s+', Text.Whitespace),
            (r'.', Text)
        ],
        'block comment' : [
            (r'[^*-]+', Comment.Multiline),
            (r'\*-', Comment.Multiline, '#pop'),
            (r'[*-]', Comment.Multiline)
        ],
        'quote string' : [
            (r'[^\\"]+', String),
            (r'"', String, '#pop'),
            (r'\\"?', String),
        ],
        'slash string' : [
            (r'[^/]+', String),
            (r'(//)+(?!/)', String),
            (r'/(//)+(?!/)', String, '#pop'),
            (r'/', String)
        ]
    }


      
On this page
No headings found.
